subject: Weekly digest: labrador track in South Asia | Albert Einstein | Q4 review | INIT-1741
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of labrador work in South Asia. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Reference profile: Albert Einstein. Reference initiative INIT-1741. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: delivery, drop-bears.
